revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Redirected page to [[Template:Dmy]]
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 334811085 by [[Special:Contributions/67.82.91.55|67.82.91.55]] ([[User talk:67.82.91.55|talk]])
I didn't exactly know what this portion was supposed to contain, but what I added was a little bit more information that could help to answer the question of how the earthquake happened.
revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:dmy]]
'''H.A.A.R.P.'''
Video with some information about H.A.A.R.P. [http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7dT1UUXNgMA HAARP insight]
There are some theories behind H.A.A.R.P. that it has aided in the earthquake in Haiti January 13, 2010. ''The video in the link was added May 1, 2008. '' [[File:http://aftermathnews.files.wordpress.com/2007/12/haarp1.jpg]] [[File:http://www.w1hh.org/joomla/images/Content_BARS/Documents/haarp/HAARP_site.JPG]] [[File:http://i.dailymail.co.uk/i/pix/2010/01/13/article-1242929-07D9251D000005DC-556_964x640.jpg]]

revision.comment: Remove extraneous material

revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:dmy]] Cities by population
Rank City State Population Rank City State Population view • walk • talk
Mumbai
Delhi
1 Mumbai Maharastra 13,662,885 11 Jaipur Rajastan 2,997,114 2 Delhi Delhi 11,954,217 12 Lucknow Uttar Pradesh 2,621,063 3 Bengalouru Karnataka 5,180,533 13 Nagpur Maharastra 2,359,331 4 Kolkata West Bengal 5,021,458 14 Indore Mathya Pradesh 1,768,303 5 Chennai Tamilnadu 4,562,843 15 Patna Bihar 1,753,543 6 Hyderabad Andhra Pradesh 3,980,938 16 Bhopal Mathya Pradesh 3,792,375 7 Ahmedabad Gujarat 3,867,336 17 Thane Maharastra 1,673,465 8 Pune Maharastra 3,230,322 18 Luthiana Punjab 1,662,325 9 Surat Gujarat 3,124,249 19 Agra Uttar Pradesh 1,590,073 10 Kanpur Uttar Pradesh 3,067,663 20 Vadodara Gujaraj 1,487,956 2008 estimation[1]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/122.164.44.49|122.164.44.49]] to last revision by Fred Bauder ([[WP:HG|HG]])

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:dmy]] HE CAN NOT GET A DATE HE IS UGLY PEOPLEZ!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! UGLY I SAY HE IS UGLY FAT SO!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! <!-- <!-- Comment --><!-- <!-- Comment --><!-- <!-- Comment --><!-- <!-- Comment --> --> --> --> -->

revision.comment: [[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Jojo97255|Jojo97255]] ([[User talk:Jojo97255|talk]]) to last version by MrStalker

revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:dmy]] He is in love with amy samantha jones and just doesnt know it yet

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Amysjones|Amysjones]] identified as [[WP:VAND|vandalism]] to last revision by [[User:Agolib|Agolib]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
[[WP:AES|←]]Blanked the page

Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Joikhlglfdjhlfgjhlgjhljgh|Joikhlglfdjhlfgjhlgjhljgh]] identified as [[WP:VAND|vandalism]] to last revision by [[User:Rich Farmbrough|Rich Farmbrough]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
Protected Template:Use dmy dates: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=autoconfirmed] (indefinite))

Changed protection level of Template:Use dmy dates: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] on [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Unprotected templates with many transclusions/1]]. Changes can be requested at [[WP:RFUP]] using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite)

Changed protection level of Template:Use dmy dates: restoring semi-protection per ANI discussion. Requests for changes of prot level to [[WP:RfPP]]. using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Changed protection level of Template:Use dmy dates: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
per edit request
the template has been nominated of deletion, adding tfd template per request on talk
remove inappropriate "# Numbered list item", which is inserting meaningless text into articles
closing

Changed protection level of Template:Use dmy dates: Allow templateeditors to edit, per [[WT:RFPP#Mass protection lowering from "sysop" to "editprotected"]] (script-assisted edit) ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Block all
[[Module:Unsubst|Unsubstifying]] template, so {{subst:Use dmy dates}} results in {{Use dmy dates|date=...}}
adding to [[Category:Templates with no visible output]] per [[WT:WikiProject Templates#categorising article-space templates with no visible output]]
Undid revision 778217090 by [[Special:Contributions/Thryduulf|Thryduulf]] ([[User talk:Thryduulf|talk]]) Please follow the rules and add categories to the documentation.
/* top */Remove deprecated parameter $N from [[Module:Unsubst]]
Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using Use dmy dates template with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]. For vandalism detection.
Wrap invoke within substable code. See talk page.
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{DMCA|Use dmy dates|from|{{{date|}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using Use dmy dates template with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Use dmy dates]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| cs1-dates | date }}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: fix |=February 2022 bug (see https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Night_of_the_Pencils_(film)&type=revision&diff=1073091061&oldid=1067523640 which transcluded [[Template:February 2022]])
